## Summary
Describe the problem or feature in 2–4 sentences.

## Context
Why does this matter?
What user, product, or engineering outcome does this support?

## Current State
Describe the current behavior, limitation, or gap.

## Desired State
Describe the intended outcome clearly.

## Scope
What is included in this issue?

- In scope:
  - 
  - 

- Out of scope:
  - 
  - 

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Technical Notes
Relevant files, modules, architecture constraints, or implementation hints.

## Dependencies / Blockers
List related issues, systems, or prerequisites.

## Risks
What could go wrong?

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Code implemented
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Reviewed and merged
